segments.text: These things I have spoken to you, that you should not be made to stumble.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: They will put you out of the synagogues; yes, the time is coming that whoever kills you will think that he offers God service.
These things they will do to you because they have not known the Father nor Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But these things I have told you, that when the time comes, you may remember that I told you of them. And these things I did not say to you at the beginning, because I was with you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

verses.title: The Work of the Holy Spirit

segments.text: But now I go away to Him who sent Me, and none of you asks Me, 'Where are You going?'
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But because I have said these things to you, sorrow has filled your heart.
Nevertheless I tell you the truth. It is to your advantage that I go away; for if I do not go away, the Helper will not come to you; but if I depart, I will send Him to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And when He has come, He will convict the world of sin, and of righteousness, and of judgment:
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: of sin, because they do not believe in Me;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: of righteousness, because I go to My Father and you see Me no more;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: of judgment, because the ruler of this world is judged.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I still have many things to say to you, but you cannot bear them now.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: However, when He, the Spirit of truth, has come, He will guide you into all truth; for He will not speak on His own authority, but whatever He hears He will speak; and He will tell you things to come.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He will glorify Me, for He will take of what is Mine and declare it to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: All things that the Father has are Mine. Therefore I said that He will take of Mine and declare it to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: A little while, and you will not see Me; and again a little while, and you will see Me, because I go to the Father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then some of His disciples said among themselves,
What is this that He says to us, 'A little while, and you will not see Me; and again a little while, and you will see Me'; and, 'because I go to the Father'?
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: What is this that He says, 'A little while'? We do not know what He is saying.
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: Now Jesus knew that they desired to ask Him, and He said to them,
Are you inquiring among yourselves about what I said, 'A little while, and you will not see Me; and again a little while, and you will see Me'?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Most assuredly, I say to you that you will weep and lament, but the world will rejoice; and you will be sorrowful, but your sorrow will be turned into joy.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: A woman, when she is in labor, has sorrow because her hour has come; but as soon as she has given birth to the child, she no longer remembers the anguish, for joy that a human being has been born into the world.
Therefore you now have sorrow; but I will see you again and your heart will rejoice, and your joy no one will take from you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And in that day you will ask Me nothing. Most assuredly, I say to you, whatever you ask the Father in My name He will give you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Until now you have asked nothing in My name. Ask, and you will receive, that your joy may be full.
segments.speaker: Jesus

verses.title: Jesus Christ Has Overcome the World

segments.text: These things I have spoken to you in figurative language; but the time is coming when I will no longer speak to you in figurative language, but I will tell you plainly about the Father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: In that day you will ask in My name, and I do not say to you that I shall pray the Father for you;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: for the Father Himself loves you, because you have loved Me, and have believed that I came forth from God.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I came forth from the Father and have come into the world. Again, I leave the world and go to the Father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: See, now You are speaking plainly, and using no figure of speech!
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: Now we are sure that You know all things, and have no need that anyone should question You. By this we believe that You came forth from God.
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: Do you now believe?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Indeed the hour is coming, yes, has now come, that you will be scattered, each to his own, and will leave Me alone. And yet I am not alone, because the Father is with Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: These things I have spoken to you, that in Me you may have peace. In the world you will have tribulation; but be of good cheer, I have overcome the world.
segments.speaker: Jesus
